candidate_lesson: ICT entries with bars_since_signal > 100 are stale execution artifacts — the signal context that justified the trade no longer reflects current price structure and must be vetoed regardless of grade.
testable_rule: if signal_layers_active includes 'SWEEP' or 'FVG_TAP' and bars_since_signal > 20: return ICTVeto  # stale microstructure context
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
